response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with broad experience and a genuine entrepreneurial streak, but the profile falls significantly short of the director-level Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role. His AI exposure is nascent (MCP tooling started April 2025, roughly two months of experience), with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale. The role demands strategic advisory work with executive stakeholders, recognized external AI expertise, and cloud platform depth — none of which the resume substantiates. His seniority level, education, and public footprint are more consistent with a Senior or Staff IC than a Director-level strategist.
strengths: Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq shows awareness of the agentic AI space
Founder of GISCollective and early-stage startup exposure demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative valued by the role
15+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and data systems signals technical breadth
concerns: AI expertise is extremely recent (~2 months) with no demonstrated products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership in AI
Education is BS-level only (no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field) and the resume shows no compensating published research or industry recognition
No evidence of director-level IC behaviors: strategic customer advisory, executive stakeholder influence, or inspiring large internal/external audiences
